scheme_name: Pradhan Mantri Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana (PMGKAY) / NFSA
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food & Public Distribution
benefit: 5 kg of free foodgrain (rice/wheat) per person per month under NFSA from Jan 2023 (PMGKAY merged with NFSA). AAY households get 35 kg/month free.
notes: PMGKAY was initially a COVID relief scheme, later merged into NFSA from Jan 2023. Eligibility = NFSA eligibility = holding a PHH or AAY ration card. The actual beneficiary selection is done by state governments.

conditions.source: NFSA 2013 — Priority Household card entitlement: 5 kg/person/month

conditions.description: Antyodaya Anna Yojana (AAY) card holder — poorest of the poor

note_on_new_ration_card: New ration card applicants must apply through state government. State determines PHH/AAY status based on socio-economic criteria. Central government sets coverage quotas per state (NFSA coverage = 75% rural, 50% urban).
